testFuzz_MultisigThreshold(uint256,uint2.details: Bounded by MAX_SIGNERS to prevent gas limit issues

test_CouncilPause_OnlyInDecentralizedMod.details: Council is configured in CENTRALIZED mode before transitioning to MULTISIG

test_EmergencyPause_DecentralizedMode_Re.details: SEQ#8 compliant: Single SC member cannot pause alone

testFuzz_ApproveAction(bytes4,bytes).notice: Fuzz test for action approval data

testFuzz_InvalidThreshold(uint256,uint25.notice: Fuzz test for invalid threshold (threshold > total)

testFuzz_MultisigThreshold(uint256,uint2.notice: Fuzz test for multisig threshold configuration

test_CouncilPause_CannotSignTwice().notice: Test that council member cannot sign twice

test_CouncilPause_NonMemberReverts().notice: Test that non-council members cannot initiate council pause

test_CouncilPause_OnlyInDecentralizedMod.notice: Test initiateCouncilPause only works in DECENTRALIZED mode

test_EmergencyPause_CentralizedMode().notice: Test emergency pause in CENTRALIZED mode (admin only)

test_EmergencyPause_DecentralizedMode_Re.notice: Test emergency pause in DECENTRALIZED mode requires 5/9 SC threshold

test_EmergencyPause_MaxDuration().notice: Test emergency pause max duration (72 hours)

test_EmergencyPause_MultisigMode().notice: Test emergency pause in MULTISIG mode (N/M approval required)

test_EmergencyPause_TrainingMode().notice: Test emergency pause in TRAINING mode (admin only)

test_ExactlyMaxSigners_Succeeds().notice: Test that exactly MAX_SIGNERS is allowed

test_GetMultisigConfig_CentralizedMode().notice: Test multisig config returns zeros in TRAINING mode

test_GetSecurityCouncilConfig_Centralize.notice: Test security council config returns zeros in TRAINING mode

test_InitialState().notice: Test initial state after deployment - now TRAINING mode

test_TimeLock_CannotBypassTimeLock().notice: Test that mode transition respects time lock

test_TimeLock_MultisigToDecentralized().notice: Test 7 day time lock for MULTISIG -> DECENTRALIZED

test_TooManySigners_Reverts().notice: Test that configuring more than MAX_SIGNERS reverts

test_Transition_Downgrade_Requires_Super.notice: Test downgrade: DECENTRALIZED -> MULTISIG (requires 30 days + supermajority)

test_Transition_InvalidDirect_Centralize.notice: Test invalid transition: CENTRALIZED directly to DECENTRALIZED

test_Transition_InvalidDirect_Training_T.notice: Test invalid transition: TRAINING directly to DECENTRALIZED

test_Transition_Multisig_To_Decentralize.notice: Test MULTISIG -> DECENTRALIZED transition with Time Lock
